attraction_name: Mountain City Trail · Jianxingpo Grand Stairway
description: Chongqing's characteristic mountain city trails, experience the ups and downs of mountain city life, urban hiking.
Chongqing landmark building, ancient palace-style architecture, a classic of modern Chinese architectural art.
Stone alleyways reminiscent of old Chongqing, preserving the traditional mountain city architectural style.
The most representative mountain city neighborhood in Chongqing, showcasing the daily life and architectural features of old Chongqing.
A thousand-year-old ancient town, traditional Bayu culture, taste local snacks, and experience the charm of old Chongqing.
A renowned art academy in Southwest China, the campus is filled with an artistic atmosphere, with an art museum open for visits.
A popular social media spot, watch the spectacle of a light rail passing through a building, and experience Chongqing's magical realism.
Revolutionary historical site, pay tribute to revolutionary martyrs, and learn about Chongqing's wartime history.
The confluence of the Yangtze River and Jialing River, a symbolic landmark and dock of Chongqing.
A treasure trove of Chongqing's history and culture, showcasing exquisite Three Gorges artifacts, and exploring Chongqing's profound history.
Chongqing's iconic architectural complex, featuring stilted building styles, dazzling night views, and the charm of the mountain city.
A famous night market district in Chongqing, offering a variety of authentic Chongqing snacks and street food.
A well-known snack street in Chongqing, featuring authentic delicacies such as Chongqing noodles and spicy sour rice noodles.
A landmark bridge spanning the Jialing River, the best viewpoint for a panoramic view of Hongya Cave and the river scenery.
The confluence of two rivers, a historic port in Chongqing, where you can take a two-river cruise to enjoy the night view.
Riverside Avenue on the south bank of the Yangtze River, the best spot to enjoy the night view of Yuzhong Peninsula.
